subcodes.first_line: O thou possessor of a seeing heart! Although, materially speaking, thou art destitute of the physical sight
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صاحب دل بینا هر چند بصر جسمانی مفقود ولی الحمد لله بصیرت قلب موجود دل
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @call to action
